content.problemStatement: Given an integer xxx, find two non-negative integers aaa and bbb such that (a∧b)+(a∨b)=x(a \wedge b) + (a \vee b) = x(a∧b)+(a∨b)=x, where ∧\wedge∧ is the bitwise AND operation and ∨\vee∨ is the bitwise OR operation.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains a single integer xxx.
content.outputFormat:
If there is no valid pair (a,b)(a, b)(a,b), print a single line containing the integer −1-1−1. Otherwise, print a single line containing two space-separated integers aaa and bbb.

If there are multiple solutions, you may print any one of them.
